title: Asia-Pacific markets pare gains as oil rebounds on Iran war-linked uncertainty
summary_full: Asia-Pacific markets rose but pared earlier gains as oil prices rebounded, underscoring lingering uncertainty over the trajectory of the Middle East conflict.
summary_public: Asia-Pacific markets rose but pared earlier gains as oil prices rebounded, underscoring lingering uncertainty over the trajectory of the Middle East conflict.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: oil rebounds on Iran war-linked uncertainty
